zh: 指令要簡短而孩子能聽懂的話、
en: Instructions should be short and easy for the child to understand.

zh: 選一個絕不在訓練期間受干擾的地方、
en: Choose a place where training will not be interrupted,

zh: 教會孩童安靜坐在便桶上、
en: Teach your child to sit quietly on the potty,

zh: 然後重複練習讓孩子走向便桶椅、
en: then repeatedly practice walking to the potty chair.

zh: 之前教會他拉下、穿上褲子。
en: Beforehand, teach them to pull their pants down and up.
